description_long: This object is a vintage-style gas pump, predominantly painted in a bright red color with metallic accents and rivet detailing along its vertical edges. The front features a rectangular display panel with analog dials, a 'REGULAR' label, and a prominent 'GAS STATION' sign in white on a red background. At the top, a round sign with the word 'GAS' in red letters sits above a white and red cap. A black fuel hose with a metallic nozzle is attached to the side, looping down and resting against the base. The sides and back are mostly plain red, with the hose and nozzle visible from the rear. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century American gas pumps, with a sturdy, boxy form and retro signage.
description: A vintage red gas pump with a round 'GAS' sign on top, analog display, and a black fuel hose with nozzle. The front features bold 'GAS STATION' signage and metallic detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display panel, 'REGULAR' and 'GAS STATION' signs, and the round 'GAS' sign on top.
description_view_1: Side view with the fuel hose and nozzle clearly visible, and the round sign seen edge-on.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain red surface with the hose partially visible on the left side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mostly plain red with the round sign seen edge-on and no visible hose.
attribute_fuel_pumps: One visible vintage-style fuel pump, painted red with metallic accents, featuring a single black hose and metallic nozzle attached to the side. The pump has an analog display and prominent signage.
attribute_station_signage: Signage includes a round sign on top with 'GAS' in red letters, a 'REGULAR' label above the display, and a large 'GAS STATION' sign on the lower front. All signage is white text on a red background, with bold, retro styling.
